data.title: Microservices
data.description: Spotify's architecture is based on a microservices model, which enables small teams to own and manage different parts of the application.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services, RESTful APIs, containerization, Kubernetes.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: The system is designed to collect, process, and analyze large volumes of data in real-time to personalize user experiences.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka, Google BigQuery, real-time data streaming.

data.title: Event-Driven Communication
data.description: Event-driven architecture allows Spotify to handle asynchronous communication between services efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Event sourcing, CQRS, Pub/Sub messaging systems.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Scalable servers to ensure reliability and availability during heavy traffic.
data.technical_spec: AWS, Google Cloud Platform, auto-scaling groups.

data.title: Polycloud Strategy
data.description: Utilization of multiple cloud providers to increase redundancy and optimize cost.
